title: Rotten Flesh Can Be Smelted To Leather
description: This datapack lets you smelt rotten flesh into leather using any furnace or blast furnace. A simple, survival-friendly way to recycle mob drops, reduce clutter, and create useful leather resources.
body:
This datapack introduces a practical and immersive way to make use of one of Minecraft’s most abundant but underutilized mob drops: rotten flesh. Instead of letting stacks of rotten flesh fill up your chests or clutter your inventory, this datapack allows you to transform it into something genuinely valuable—leather. By simply placing rotten flesh into a furnace or blast furnace, players can smelt it into leather, providing an efficient and balanced method for obtaining this essential resource.

Leather is used for crafting books, item frames, armor, and various decorative items, making it an important material throughout your survival progression. However, acquiring large amounts of leather typically requires farming cows, which can be time-consuming, noisy, and resource-heavy. With this datapack, players gain an alternative path that feels natural and survival-friendly, while still maintaining a sense of balance. Smelting rotten flesh consumes fuel and time, so it doesn’t replace traditional farming—it simply expands your options.

This datapack is perfect for players who enjoy automation, storage optimization, or simply want more uses for items that often go to waste. It fits seamlessly into any world, requires no resource pack, and works in both singleplayer and multiplayer. Install it, and give rotten flesh a meaningful purpose!
